questions.scenario: A task copies a static README file for operators. The pull request also restarts `nginx` unconditionally after that task. What is the best review comment?

options.text: Ask why a documentation file should restart nginx, and prefer notifications only from config tasks that affect the service.
Approve because every file task should restart every service.
Use `ignore_errors` so the restart cannot fail the play.

questions.explanation: Restarts should follow real service-affecting changes. Unconditional restarts create avoidable disruption and make reviews noisier.
